rich_features.title: 4K Meets 4G, Clear Everywhere
rich_features.desc: Thanks to its independent 4G network, the Go PT Ultra can be installed in various outdoor environments. Combined with 4K UHD resolution, it delivers clear and detailed images anytime, anywhere.

rich_features.title: Flexible Data Plans & Charging Options
rich_features.desc: Stay completely wire-free and independent. Powered by the sun and connected through local mobile networks, this camera is built for remote locations.

items.title: Where There's Sunlight, There's Power
items.desc: The 6W Reolink Solar Panel 2 continuously supplies Go PT Ultra with clean, sustainable energy. Just 10 minutes of charging a day keeps the camera running reliably. Even in cloudy weather, the built-in battery lasts up to two months.

rich_features.title: Upgraded to 4K. See More in Every Direction
rich_features.desc: As an enhanced version, the Go PT Ultra delivers stunning 4K visuals, capturing every scene with remarkable clarity and precision.

rich_features.title: Color or Black & White, 4K Vision Extends into the Night
rich_features.desc: Choose between full color or sharp black-and-white night vision modes to protect your property after dark.

options.label: Color Night Vision
options.desc: With spotlights, the Go PT Ultra captures vivid, true-to-life color images even in low light or shadowed environments.

options.label: Black-and-White Night Vision
options.desc: In complete darkness, it automatically switches to black-and-white night vision. The PIR (Passive Infrared) sensor detects all motions up to 10 meters away, ensuring nothing escapes from sight.

rich_features.title: 360° Coverage, Full Protection
rich_features.desc: Its 355° pan and 140° tilt allow for all-sided monitoring—no blind spots, just full coverage. Define up to 32 preset positions for instantly monitoring vulnerable spots like gates or windows.

rich_features.title: Smart AI Detection. Fewer False Alarms
rich_features.desc: By accurately distinguishing people, vehicles, and pets from other moving objects, Go PT Ultra reduces false alerts and sends you real-time notifications about what really matters on your property.

rich_features.title: Dual Warning. Double Security
rich_features.desc: When an intruder is detected, the camera's powerful spotlights and custom siren automatically activate to warn off unwanted visitors, preventing potential break-ins before they happen.

rich_features.title: Two-Way Audio. Real-Time Talkback
rich_features.desc: With the built-in microphone and speaker, you can have a live conversation with anyone in front of the camera, whether greeting visitors, talking to the delivery agent, or warning suspicious strangers.

rich_features.title: Utility Features
rich_features.desc: Enhance your surveillance with time-lapse video generation, weatherproofing, and flexible local storage options.

cards.title: The Magic of Time Lapse
cards.desc: Time-lapse videos show an enchanting world where long-term events like sunrises or constructions take place in minutes or seconds.

cards.title: Secure Storage Options
cards.desc: Save your motion-triggered recordings locally to a microSD card (up to 128GB) with no monthly subscriptions.

cards.title: Built to Endure (IP64)
cards.desc: This weatherproof smart IP camera works perfectly both inside and outside your home, even in harsh weather conditions.

rich_features.title: Everything Under Control, Anywhere & Anytime
rich_features.desc: Once suspicious events are detected, the camera will send you instant alerts via push notifications and emails. Watch real-time video feeds from your property and keep an eye on what matters most, anytime, anywhere.

items.title: Real-Time Alerts
items.desc: Once suspicious events are detected, the camera will send you instant alerts via push notifications and emails. You can also set detection sensitivity for more accurate alerts.

items.title: Live View
items.desc: Watch real-time video feeds from your property and keep an eye on what matters most, anytime, anywhere.

items.title: Smart Playback
items.desc: Filter the stored video recordings by event type and timeline to find the clip you need in just a snap.

items.title: Customizable Detection Zone
items.desc: By customizing detection zones, you can define the zones where the camera detects or does not, ignoring busy roads or walkways.

options.label: Works with Google Assistant
options.desc: With voice commands, you can quickly access your camera and watch live streaming on Google Nest Hub or Chromecast-enabled TV.

options.label: Works with Alexa
options.desc: This Alexa-enabled camera can be controlled through voice commands. You can view the live stream on your Echo Spot, Echo Show, or Fire TV.

reviews.name: M. Ahmed
reviews.text: Reolink Go PT Plus camera farm pe install kiya. 4G SIM se bilkul smooth chal raha hai, raat ko bhi clear video milti hai. COD process bohat asaan tha.

reviews.name: Ali Raza
reviews.text: Solar panel ke saath battery life excellent hai. 1 month se daily monitoring kar raha hoon without any issue. Recommended!
reviews.product: Reolink Go PT Plus + Solar Panel

reviews.name: Sara Khan
reviews.text: Customer support was very responsive. Camera quality is great, only delivery took 3 days instead of 2.
